title: Forehead Patches
subtitle: Stable for 2–3 months
ratio: Gum Arabic : Hyaluronic Acid : Stable Vitamin C = 10 : 1 : 1

title: Vitamin C Serum
subtitle: 2 oz — Spoon Version
steps: Stir in Vitamin C powder until fully dissolved

title: Hyaluronic Acid Serum
subtitle: ~2 oz (60 mL)
ingredients: 20 mL (~1 tbsp + 1 tsp) aloe vera juice
steps: Step 1 — Hydrate the HA (DO THIS FIRST): Combine distilled water + aloe + glycerin. Slowly sprinkle in HA powder. Let sit 4–12 hours — don't rush it. You'll get a smooth gel base.
Step 2 — Add Vitamin C: Once gel is formed, stir in Vitamin C powder. Mix until fully dissolved. It may thin slightly — totally normal.
Step 3 — Finish: Add Vitamin E (optional). Bottle in amber or dark glass.

title: Lip Tint
subtitle: roll-on applicator
steps: Stir in jojoba and rosehip oil

title: Neck Silicone Patch Treatment
subtitle: Collagen stimulation, 2–4x per week
ingredients: Your choice of one collagen active: Retinol, DIY Vitamin C serum, or Peptides
steps: Step 1 — Cleanse & dry the neck area completely before any actives.

Step 2 — Caffeine first (optional, circulation prep): Apply 2–3 drops of The Ordinary Caffeine Solution 5% to the neck. Pat gently — do not rub. Let absorb fully, about 60–90 seconds. This primes microcirculation before your active.

Step 3 — Choose your collagen active based on your rotation schedule. On Vitamin C nights: apply 3–4 drops of your DIY Vitamin C serum. On Retinol nights: use a pea-sized amount of gentle retinol. On Copper Peptide nights: apply 2–3 drops of copper peptide serum. NOTE — never use Vitamin C and copper peptides on the same night. They counteract each other. Alternate them across your weekly rotation.
Step 4 — Let your chosen active absorb for 2–3 minutes before the next step.
Step 5 — Apply silicone patch firmly over the neck area. Leave on for a minimum of 30 minutes, or overnight for best results.
Step 6 — After removing patch, gently pat any remaining serum into skin. Follow with your moisturizer or HA serum if desired.
Suggested weekly rotation: Monday — Vitamin C. Wednesday — Copper Peptides. Friday — Retinol. Adjust based on your skin's tolerance.

title: Massage Serum
subtitle: 2–3 uses worth
ingredients: 4 drops grapefruit or bergamot essential oil
steps: Mix gently — use within a few days

title: Cheek Tint
subtitle: roll-on applicator
steps: Combine witch hazel, water, HA powder
